Calculate similarities between target sentence and candidate sentences

Source: R/text_highlighting.R
calculate_sentence_similarities.Rd

Calculate similarities between target sentence and candidate sentences

Usage

calculate_sentence_similarities(
  candidate_sentences,
  clean_target,
  source_words
)

Arguments

candidate_sentences

Vector of candidate sentences

clean_target

Target sentence to match

source_words

Words from the target sentence

Value

Vector of similarity scores

On this page

Developed by Nathan Layman.

list(text = “EcoReview - Human-in-the-loop review for ecological data extraction”)
